name: Homemade Taco Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl until evenly distributed.
2. Spoon the mixture onto a 6-inch square of aluminum foil; fold to make an airtight packet.
3. Label with date and contents.
4. Store in a cool, dry place. For best flavor, use within about 6 months.
5. Makes 1 packet or about 2 tablespoons of Homemade Taco Seasoning Mix.
